title: Basilisk

{{Quote|Basilisk was once a lush, humid world located not far from Coruscant. Its inhabitants, the Basiliskans, were an intelligent, lizard-like species who were known throughout the Republic for expertly crafting fearsome droids that were nothing short of weapons of war.|[[Jedi Archives (Tython)|Tython Jedi Archives]] historical account|<ref name="TOR" />}}
'''Basilisk''' was a [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core]] world in the [[Arrowhead]] of [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]], near [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==History==
{{Quote|At the dawn of the "Great Shadow Crusade" (the moniker by which the Mandalorians know the time of the Great Sith War), the Mandalorians turned their bloodthirsty gaze to Basilisk. The ruthless warriors ravaged the planet without mercy, seeking to enslave the Basiliskan people and their war droids. |Tython Jedi Archives historical account|<ref name="TOR" />}}
Basilisk was home to the [[Basiliskan]]s, an intelligent [[Reptile/Legends|lizard]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. They were the creators of the [[Basilisk war droid/Legends|Basilisk war droids]], that were rumored to be modeled after themselves. During their war with the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] around the year [[4017 BBY]], the Basiliskans chemically poisoned their own [[Planet/Legends|planet]], in a last effort to defeat their conquerors. Despite receiving [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] reinforcements under [[Sidrona Diath]] at the [[Battle of Basilisk]], the Mandalorians conquered the planet and enslaved the remaining Basiliskans.

After the war, the Mandalorians found a new use for the Basiliskans. With their tough hides and claws, with which they could be trained, and their intelligence, the Mandalorians used them as weapons for aerial and ground fighting during later wars. Because of this the Basiliskans degenerated and became nothing more than beasts. As such, they were re-named the Lagartoz War Dragons.

During the [[Jedi Civil War]] there was [[Battle of Basilisk (Jedi Civil War)|another battle]] over the planet.<ref name="TEA" /> The planet was once more [[Battle of Basilisk (Clone Wars)|fought over]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="TNEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref>

The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Capture of Basilisk|captured]] the planet at some point after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].<ref name="GaW" />

==Behind the scenes==
The PC [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] mistakenly places Basilisk in the [[Moddell sector/Legends|Moddell sector]].
